Luke Combs at OU Memorial Stadium on May 9 is the largest Norman demand anchor this week.
Earth, Wind & Fire at Riverwind overlaps with Norman stadium traffic on May 9.
Jake’s New Face Showcase adds Riverwind mid-week demand on May 7.
Comets baseball keeps Bricktown active throughout the week.
